stories.title: Fix failing test: SalarySlipCustomFields — lp07 custom lhdn status field exists
stories.description: Automated test `test_lp07_custom_lhdn_status_field_exists` is failing with status FAIL. This indicates a regression or missing implementation in the unit:lhdn_payroll suite. LP-07: custom_lhdn_status field exists on Salary Slip.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause resolved: 'custom_lhdn_status' not found in ['employee_and_payroll_tab', 'section_break_6', 'employee', 'employee_name', 'company', 'department', 'designation', 'branch', 'column_break_obdl', 'posting_date', 'l
technicalNotes: Test description: LP-07: custom_lhdn_status field exists on Salary Slip.

stories.title: Fix failing test: SalarySlipCustomFields — lp09 epf fields exist

acceptanceCriteria: Root cause resolved: False is not true : Expected at least 2 EPF fields, got: []
technicalNotes: Test description: LP-09: EPF employee/employer fields exist on Salary Slip.
